tools.name: batch-status
tools.description: Zeigt Batch-Client Status: enabled, eligible_tasks, poll_interval.
command: import sys; sys.path.insert(0,'/Users/jeremy/dev/stealth-batch'); from stealth_batch import get_batch_client; import json; c=get_batch_client(); print(json.dumps({'enabled':c.enabled,'eligible':c.eligible_keywords,'poll_interval':c.poll_interval}, indent=2))

tools.name: batch-is-eligible
tools.description: Prüft ob Task für Batch-Verarbeitung geeignet ist.
command: import sys; sys.path.insert(0,'/Users/jeremy/dev/stealth-batch'); from stealth_batch import get_batch_client; c=get_batch_client(); print('ELIGIBLE' if c.is_eligible(sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv)>1 else '') else 'NOT ELIGIBLE')
